items.title: US Supreme Court rejects Trump’s unprecedented bid to fire Fed governor Lisa Cook
items.summary:
The US Supreme Court refused on Monday to let President Donald Trump ⁠fire Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook as it stood firm to preserve the central bank’s cherished independence against an unprecedented challenge.
The court, in a 5-4 ruling, blocked Trump’s bid to become the first president to remove a Fed official since Congress created the central bank in 1913. In his second term as president

primary_item.title: Chinese self-driving firm Momenta eyes US$750m in Hong Kong IPO
primary_item.summary:
Chinese self-driving technology start-up Momenta kicked off bookbuilding on Monday for a HK$5.89 billion (US$751 million) share listing on the Hong Kong stock exchange, testing market sentiment amid a sales slump in China’s car industry.
The company is offering nearly 19.94 million shares at HK$295.60 per share. With 20 shares as the minimum board lot, the minimum investment is HK$5,971.62.
